query:
INSERT INTO product_batches (batchCode, productId, customerId, customRequirements, fobSellingPrice, productionStatus, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 'DC-001-B001', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 'Gray upholstery with darker shade', 72.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DC-001-GRY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DC-001-B002', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 2), 'Custom backrest height: 90cm instead of 85cm', 75.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DC-001-GRY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DC-001-B003', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 3), 'Standard version, bulk order 100+ units', 58.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DC-001-GRY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DC-001-B004', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 4), 'Premium fabric upgrade, stain-resistant', 78.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DC-001-GRY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DC-002-B001', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 5), 'Walnut with espresso stain finish', 90.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DC-002-WAL'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DC-002-B002', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 6), 'Custom rope color: natural beige', 88.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DC-002-WAL'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DC-002-B003', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 7), 'Bulk order 120+ units, volume discount', 73.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DC-002-WAL'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DC-003-B001', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 8), 'White molded seat with color customization', 56.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DC-003-WHT'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DC-003-B002', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 9), 'Custom wood leg finish: walnut instead of beech', 58.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DC-003-WHT'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DC-003-B003', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 10), 'Standard version, bulk order 150+ units', 46.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DC-003-WHT'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DC-003-B004', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 11), 'Premium plastic upgrade, UV-resistant', 60.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DC-003-WHT'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DC-003-B005', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 12), 'Custom dimensions: wider seat (50cm)', 62.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DC-003-WHT'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DC-004-B001', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 13), 'Navy blue velvet with deeper tufting', 102.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DC-004-NVY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DC-004-B002', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 14), 'Custom leg finish: natural oak instead of black', 98.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DC-004-NVY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DC-004-B003', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 15), 'Standard version, bulk order 80+ units', 84.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DC-004-NVY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DC-004-B004', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 16), 'Premium velvet upgrade, stain-resistant coating', 108.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DC-004-NVY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DC-005-B001', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 17), 'Oak with darker stain, custom spindle count', 85.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DC-005-OAK'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DC-005-B002', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 18), 'Standard version, premium wood treatment', 80.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DC-005-OAK'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'DC-005-B003', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 19), 'Bulk order 100+ units, volume pricing', 68.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'DC-005-OAK';
